name: update_user_preferences
desc: Update a user preference. Common keys: user_pref_measurement_units (metric/imperial), user_pref_default_view_scale (1:50/1:100/1:200), user_pref_mep_design_standard (CIBSE/ASHRAE), user_pref_ai_response_detail (concise/normal/detailed), user_pref_ai_thinking_steps_display (expanded/collapsed/hidden), user_pref_auto_accept_ai_changes, user_pref_favourite_commands, user_pref_display_language, user_pref_temperature_unit (celsius/fahrenheit), user_pref_pipe_sizing_standard, user_pref_duct_sizing_method.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The new value for the preference.
